documentation.description: Called once on deploy.
Demonstrate Box.create() — allocates storage for the box.

args.size: - byte length for the new box

documentation.returns: true if the box was newly created

documentation.description: Demonstrate Box .value setter and .exists check.

args.data: - raw bytes to store in the box

documentation.description: Demonstrate Box .value getter and .get() with default.
documentation.returns: the box contents, or empty bytes if the box doesn't exist

documentation.description: Demonstrate Box .delete().
documentation.returns: true if the box existed and was deleted

documentation.description: Demonstrate Box .maybe() — returns [value, exists] tuple.
Demonstrate .extract() — read a slice of bytes from a box.
Demonstrate .replace() — overwrite bytes at a given offset.
Demonstrate .splice() — insert/remove bytes at a given offset.

args.data: - bytes to insert at the splice point

documentation.description: Demonstrate .resize() — grow or shrink a box.

args.newSize: - desired byte length for the box

documentation.description: Demonstrate .length — get the byte length of a box.
documentation.returns: the current byte length of the box

documentation.description: Demonstrate BoxMap write — set a key-value pair.
Demonstrate BoxMap read — get a value by key.

args.key: - the map key to look up

documentation.returns: the stored bytes, or empty bytes if the key doesn't exist

documentation.description: Demonstrate BoxMap .exists check.
documentation.returns: true if the key exists in the map

documentation.description: Demonstrate BoxMap .delete().
documentation.returns: true if the key existed and was deleted

documentation.description: Demonstrate BoxMap .length on a specific entry.
documentation.returns: the byte length of the keyed box

documentation.description: Demonstrate dynamic GlobalState creation using runtime keys (requires stateTotals to reserve slots).
Read a dynamic global state value.

args.key: - the global state key to read

documentation.description: Delete a dynamic global state key.

args.key: - the global state key to remove

documentation.description: End-to-end test combining multiple box operations with assertions.

args.data: - raw bytes to round-trip through the box
